packSummary: The 1995-96 NBA season pack now carries a much fuller historical universe: all 29 franchises, a deeper 445-player pool, and expanded game/stat coverage so season boots and Draft The Era runs have more texture right away.
featuredStorylines: A full-league Draft The Era sandbox
Deeper authored schedule and stat coverage across the 1995-96 universe

teamSpotlights.summary: Chicago remains the flagship path and the benchmark every historical run will be measured against.
Houston anchors the elite center fantasy of the era behind Hakeem Olajuwon.
Orlando gives the pack a Shaq-and-Penny superstar route with a different ceiling than Chicago.
Seattle offers a speed-and-athleticism contender path built around Payton and Kemp.
San Antonio gives you an MVP-level interior anchor through David Robinson.

modeSummaries.summary: Keep history intact and see whether you can match or beat the era-defining outcomes.
Remix the full-league 1995-96 player universe and discover what the era looks like with custom rosters.
